      SideProofStore.Entry[] SideProofStore.getEntries()
      Returns all available SideProofStore.Entrys.
      SideProofStore.Entry SideProofStore.getEntry(Proof proof)
      Returns the SideProofStore.Entry for the given Proof.
      SideProofStore.Entry SideProofStore.getEntryAt(int index)
      Returns the SideProofStore.Entry at the given index.

      Checks if the given SideProofStore.Entry is contained.

      void SideProofStore.removeEntries(java.util.Collection<SideProofStore.Entry> entries)
      Removes the given SideProofStore.Entrys.
